name: Naan
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients to form a dough. Let rise until doubled, for about 1 hour.
2. Punch dough down and divide it into 10 parts. Roll each into a thin circle.
3. Brush one side of each circle with water.
4. Spray griddle with noncaloric spray. Put circles on hot griddle, watered side up.
5. Bake until half done--lightly browned, about three minutes.
6. Transfer to cookie sheet.
7. Bake in 400 degree oven until done (about 5 to 10 minutes) or use broiler for about 1 minute to finish cooking.
